positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical vector illustration of a stylized celestial forest. The scene features intertwining geometric roots, bioluminescent flora, and crystalline moons set against a deep cosmic indigo background. Incorporate glowing constellations, stylized cosmic dust clouds, and clean, flowing silhouettes of mythical fauna (like winged deer or ethereal owls). Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep midnight blue, glowing teal, metallic silver, and vibrant violet. The composition must be perfectly centered and designed as a seamless, striking focal point suitable for apparel printing. Intricate linework, woodcut style mixed with neon bioluminescence, clean edges, graphic design quality.
negative: text, watermark, logo, signature, copyright, blurry, low resolution, noisy, grainy, jpeg artifacts, bad anatomy, deformities, extra limbs, monochrome, washed out, distracting background elements
